name: essentials-of-classic-italian-cooking
description: Marcella Hazan's definitive 'Essentials of Classic Italian Cooking' — the complete guide to Italian home cooking from the most authoritative voice in the field. Covers battuto-soffritto-insaporire techniques, regional Italian cuisines, ingredient selection, and hundreds of authentic recipes from appetizers to desserts.
useCase: Learning classic Italian cooking techniques, understanding Italy's regional cuisines, selecting and preparing authentic Italian ingredients, and making dishes from pasta sauces to roasts to desserts.
knownRisks: Recipes are designed for home cooking, not professional kitchens
Fresh, high-quality ingredients are essential — substitutions compromise results
Some ingredients may be hard to find outside major cities
Cookbook, not a food science or nutrition text
Author is opinionated about methods and ingredients — her way is not the only way
